description: Read/write routing.toml — V6 dynamic runtime config with [bots.*] and [channels.*]; written by CLI (bot/channel/agent), consumed by channel-server and bridge

key_classes_functions.name: load_routing
key_classes_functions.purpose: Load routing.toml (or empty dict with bots/channels keys if missing)

key_classes_functions.name: init_routing
key_classes_functions.purpose: Create empty routing.toml on project create

key_classes_functions.name: add_bot
key_classes_functions.purpose: Register [bots.<name>] with app_id + optional credential_file / default_agent_template / lazy_create_enabled / supervises; raise on duplicate

key_classes_functions.name: list_bots
key_classes_functions.purpose: Flatten bots dict into list with 'name' field

key_classes_functions.name: add_channel
key_classes_functions.purpose: Register [channels.<id>] with optional bot/external_chat_id/entry_agent; validates bot exists

key_classes_functions.name: list_channels
key_classes_functions.purpose: Flatten channels into list with channel_id field

key_classes_functions.name: join_agent
key_classes_functions.purpose: Set entry_agent if empty (first-agent-wins) or as_entry=True; never stores channel→agents roster
